message:
Fix Pin projection in OwnedWriteFuture, waiter cleanup, and broadcast drop safety

Sync correctness fixes across four files:

- rwlock: Refactor OwnedWriteFuture to use get_mut() for Pin projection
  instead of repeated field access through Pin, eliminating an Arc::clone
  borrow conflict that could cause subtle UB under Miri. Also reformat
  WriteFuture/OwnedWriteFuture Drop impls for consistency.

- pool: Replace 7 sites of `.retain(|w| w.id != id)` with
  `.position(|w| w.id == id).map(|i| .remove(i))` for precise
  single-element waiter removal. retain() scans the entire VecDeque and
  could remove duplicate entries; position+remove stops at the first match.

- once_cell: Replace WaitInit drop's retain-based waiter cleanup with
  position+swap_remove for the same single-element correctness guarantee.

- broadcast: Move buffer clear in Receiver::drop to take-then-drop-outside-lock
  pattern. Previously the buffer was cleared while holding the inner lock,
  which could cause priority inversion if T's Drop impl is expensive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
